quotes: Reclaim your time, reclaim your life.
Focus on what matters, not what scrolls.
Every minute counts, don't waste it on screens.
Break free from the endless scroll.
Your time is precious, use it wisely.
Less scrolling, more living.
Don't let social media control your time.
Take back your day, one minute at a time.
Time is a gift, don't waste it on distractions.
Stay focused, stay productive.
The world won't end if you don't check your phone.
Life is happening now, don't miss it.
You are more than your screen time.
Your attention is a superpower, use it wisely.
Don't let the algorithm dictate your day.
Reclaim your time, rediscover yourself.
Every second counts, make it count.
Focus on the present, not the feed.
The less you scroll, the more you live.
Your time is a currency, invest it wisely.
Break the cycle of mindless scrolling.
Take control of your time, take control of your life.
There's a world beyond your screen.
Don't get lost in the digital haze.
Make every minute a meaningful one.
Prioritize your time, prioritize your life.
The power is in your hands, not in your phone.
Use your time to create, not just consume.
The world needs your attention, not just your likes.
Don't let the noise distract you from the signal.
You have the power to choose how you spend your time.
Every moment is a chance to start anew.
Time is a limited resource, use it wisely.
Don't let the digital world dictate your pace.
Reclaim your time, reclaim your sanity.
Your time is a gift, unwrap it with intention.
Less screen time, more me time.
The less you scroll, the more you achieve.
Your focus is a muscle, exercise it regularly.
You are the CEO of your time, manage it wisely.
Don't let social media define your self-worth.
Take back your time, take back your power.
Life is too short to waste on endless scrolling.
Your time is precious, treat it with care.
Every minute is a new opportunity.
The world is waiting for you, don't get stuck on your screen.
Use your time to make a difference, not just to make a scroll.
The less you scroll, the more you connect.
Reclaim your time, reconnect with life.
You have the power to choose how you spend your day.
Don't let the algorithm dictate your happiness.
Your time is a canvas, paint it with intention.
Every moment is a chance to create something new.
The world needs your unique perspective, not just your likes.
Don't let the digital world define your reality.
Reclaim your time, rediscover your passions.
Your time is a journey, navigate it with purpose.
The less you scroll, the more you explore.
Use your time to learn, not just to like.
Every minute is a new chance to grow.
The world is full of possibilities, don't get stuck on your screen.
Your time is a gift, unwrap it with gratitude.
Reclaim your time, reclaim your creativity.
Don't let social media stifle your imagination.
Take back your time, take back your dreams.
Life is too short to waste on mindless scrolling.
Your time is precious, use it to make a difference.
Every moment is a chance to shine.
The world needs your light, not just your likes.
Reclaim your time, reclaim your voice.
Don't let the algorithm dictate your story.
Your time is a book, write it with intention.
Every minute is a new page.
The less you scroll, the more you achieve.
Use your time to create a masterpiece, not just a scroll.

videos.title: How to focus in a world of distractions
videos.creator: TED
